attacking_style: Not a primary attacker. Shows ability to make elite selections in Ardennes climbs and breakaways, but lacks explosive power on steep gradients to finish attacks on uphill finishes.
team_tactics: Primarily functions as high-powered domestique for INEOS. Delivers exceptionally long leadouts prioritizing track position, and performs tempo-setting duties on climbs when team lacks protected GC options.
terrain_preference: Flat to rolling terrain and time trials where power-to-weight matters less. Exposed on steep uphill finishes and gradient changes requiring explosive acceleration.
vulnerability: Uphill finishes reveal limited explosive power on gradients (9-second fade Tour de Suisse, unable to finish Amstel/Flèche attacks). Lacks punch needed for Ardennes-style steep ramps.
key_patterns: Strong early pacing but fades on uphill finishes - gradient weakness evident across multiple races.
Emerging time trial specialist: third place Tirreno-Adriatico TT against established names, early benchmark setter.
Exceptionally long leadout work for INEOS sprinters, prioritizing early track position over timing.
Can make elite selections in Ardennes/hilly races but cannot finish on steep climbs.
Deployed for tempo-setting when INEOS lacks protected climber, exposing team depth issues.
form_trajectory: neutral: Shows WT-level TT breakthrough (2023 Tirreno podium) but repeated gradient weakness on uphill finishes limits GC progression. Settling into high-powered domestique role.
